metadata.description: Personal fork of claude-hud — OMC-tuned (oh-my-claudecode orchestration awareness), OAC-compatible, cross-platform (Windows experimental), built-in launcher scripts

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline for Claude Code, tuned for oh-my-claudecode (OMC mode indicator + .omc mission state, proxy_ tool routing, omc: namespace rendering) with leftover OpenAgentsControl compat (oac:* rendering, <task-notification> background completion). Cross-platform, Windows experimental.
